name: Write-Host

options.name: -BackgroundColor
options.description: Specifies the background color. There is no default. The acceptable values for this parameter are:

options.name: -ForegroundColor
options.description: Specifies the text color. There is no default. The acceptable values for this parameter are:

options.name: -NoNewline
options.description: The string representations of the input objects are concatenated to form the output. No spaces or newlines are inserted between the output strings. No newline is added after the last output string.

name: -Object
-Msg
-Message
options.description: Objects to display in the host.

options.name: -Separator
options.description: Specifies a separator string to insert between objects displayed by the host.

description: Writes customized output to a host.
